title: Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney Lyrics Ninaivil Nindraval Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers : Bombay Jayshree, Sricharan
Song: Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney
Music Director : D Imman
Lyrics : Valee
Movie Name : Ninaivil Nindraval

Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney,Yen Kalvaney, Ennai cherava
Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney, Yen Kalvaney, Ennai cherava

Kulir vaadayai pola ennai thottu sendraai
Nejai aasayin yeniyil vittu sendraan
POllaatha kalvanthaane
ennai naane thirudukinren
[Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney, Ennai cherava] (2)

Maalai melirundhu medhuvaai irangi
Nilammel nadakkum nizhal megame
Manadhukule mazhai adithaal
Athan kaaranam kaaranam yaarthaano

Ulnaadi engum urchaaga melam
Pongaamal pongi paaindhoda
Mel moochu konjam, kel moochu konjam
Vaangaamal vaangi naan vaada
Inbamo thunbamo, sol thonraamal vazhkiren

Oruvan oruvan vizhiyin vazhiye
enaakul uthithaan etharkaagavo
Mana vayalil ninaivu vidhai 
Avan thoovida thoovida paarthaene

Munnalum illai, pinnalum illai 
ennalum illaa aanandham
Manmeedhu vazhum pen vazhvil illai 
en vazhvil thaane aarambam
Dhevathai yaavume kadhal seikindra leelayo...
Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney, Yen Kalvaney, Ennai cherava

ennai naane thirudukinren  ..

Everything i wanna see your face
There are things i can relate
I am telling you be my maid
I'll show you your best days

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of romantic yearning.

Who are the singers of this song?

Bombay Jayashree and Sricharan lend their voices to this beautiful duet.

Who composed the music for Ninaivil Nindraval?

The music was composed by D Imman, known for his melodic compositions.

What role does the song play in the movie?

The song underscores a pivotal romantic moment, enhancing the emotional depth of the scene.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney is a romantic duet from the movie Ninaivil Nindraval, beautifully sung by Bombay Jayashree and Sricharan. The song captures the essence of love and longing, with lyrics by Vaali that evoke deep emotions. D Imman's music adds a soothing melody that complements the heartfelt lyrics. This song plays during a significant romantic moment in the film, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kalvaney Yen Kalvaney from the movie Ninaivil Nindraval is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance and longing. With the soulful voices of Bombay Jayashree and Sricharan, paired with D Imman's enchanting music, this song is a timeless melody. Dive into the poetic world crafted by lyricist Vaali and experience the magic of love through music.
stanzaMeanings: Thief, oh my thief, my thief, come to me. Thief, oh my thief, my thief, come to me.
Like a cold breeze, you touched me and left. You left desires in my heart. Oh, bad thief, I am stealing myself.
Gently descending from the sky, a shadow cloud walks on the ground. If it rains in the heart, who is the reason for it?
Everywhere inside, there's a lively rhythm. It rises and jumps without stopping. I breathe in a little, breathe out a little, without taking, I wither. I live without knowing if it's joy or sorrow.
Someone came into me through the path of eyes, for some reason. In the field of my mind, I saw him sowing seeds of memories.
There was no past, no future, only endless happiness. In a woman's life, there's no beginning, but in my life, it's the start. Are all angels playing the game of love?
Thief, oh my thief, my thief, come to me.
Like a cold breeze, you touched me and left. You left desires in my heart. Oh, bad thief, I am stealing myself.
Everything I wanna see your face There are things I can relate I am telling you be my maid I'll show you your best days
